system.damage: word of false pain d8 (near, area, ignores armor)
system.specialQuality: tethered to the device; broken body; aware of all that his servants perceive

selected: to jealously hoard secrets > Inflict false sensations on others > Fix someone with his terrible gaze > Reveal a plan or a horrid truth > Control his lithic servants like they were extensions of himself > Recover from any wound, slowly and never fully
